name: 14 · Streaming Output
description: Data-plane streaming (docs/25). A producer AutomatedStep declares a Data/Out channel 'words' and writes 4 elements (the/quick/brown/fox) over an out-of-band transport bracketed by open/close control emissions — the bulk bytes never enter the net marking, so the net sees only two firings (open + close) regardless of element count. A consumer declares a Data/In channel 'words' wired from the producer's open handle; it drains the stream via aithericon.stream('words') EARLY (while the producer still produces), folds (concatenates) the elements in stream order, and emits the transcript 'the quick brown fox'. Replaces the retired net-native StreamFold node — the fold is a plain reducer job.
